title: Goniopteris radicans
taxonomy: Goniopteris radicans is classified as a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This family belongs to the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The class Polypodiopsida is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The division Pteridophyta is one of the major divisions of the kingdom Plantae. Within the kingdom Plantae, Goniopteris radicans is also classified as a vascular plant.

intro: Goniopteris radicans, also known as the creeping fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Blechnaceae, characterized by its creeping rhizomes and small, lance-shaped leaves. The health benefits of Goniopteris radicans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues.
